历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Physics Category) were approximately 83, 82, 94, 94, and 108 respectively, showing a slow backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 26 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 108.\nThe university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Henan Province: 62 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 60 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 65 in 2025; in 2026, the Physics Category plan significantly expands to 131, an increase of about 101.5% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion magnitude, theoretically pushing the ranking number higher (easing competition), but other factors need to be considered comprehensively.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking first in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving school management, campus safety, and dormitory cafeterias, but overall it remains neutral to slightly negative, with no obvious signs of a drop in admission; Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with massive short video exposure and continuously high application attention; Tsinghua University has over 20 A+ disciplines (such as Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Architecture, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Law, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, etc.), and more than 30 disciplines rated A- or above, with top national disciplinary strength highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous majors at Tsinghua are all highly recommended/recommended in 2026; clinical medicine, stomatology, and other medical majors continue to be relatively popular; the total number of candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (uncertain), a significant increase from the combined total of about 907,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025, intensifying competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing (not within the province), with no local enrollment preference in Henan; 20.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of historical rankings, the downward push on rankings from the significant expansion of the Physics Category in 2026 (+101.5%), the intensified competition due to the growth in the number of candidates in Henan Province, and Tsinghua's sustained high popularity as a top national university, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 108, the expansion effect and the candidate growth effect offset each other, with the expected minimum ranking around 154, in the range of 104–204.

- Automation

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Xiuzhong Academy/Ziqiang Academy/Shuimu Academy)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 104–204, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (≤104), focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 204), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as backups, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.
